pi_items.source: Web search confirmed that 0.38 S corresponds to the Galapagos Islands/Marine Reserve.
Web search confirmed that 90.30 W corresponds to the Galapagos Islands/Marine Reserve.
A marine reserve exists at sea level, which corresponds to 0 meters altitude.

Inspected setup_task.sh which synthetically generates TLE data using these precise NORAD IDs. Note: While 42028 corresponds to Flock 3p 65 in reality, the setup script explicitly assigns it to Sentinel-2B.
Confirmed via geographic knowledge that -90 degrees longitude centers the map over the Eastern Pacific near the Galapagos.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated TLE data injected via setup_task.sh. The coordinate requirements (-0.3800, -90.3000) correctly correspond to the real Galapagos Islands and Marine Reserve. The required satellite NORAD IDs exactly match those mock-generated by the setup script. Although NORAD ID 42028 corresponds to Flock 3p 65 in the real world, it is explicitly aliased to Sentinel-2B within the task's synthetic TLEs.
